events.output_text:
**Context Summary:**  
Ticket TKT-100 is linked to sub-tickets TKT-101, TKT-102, and TKT-103, which are dependent on its resolution. Additionally, it references external tasks in the project management system (e.g., Task-PM-001) and has associated attachments stored in the cloud repository. Deleting TKT-100 will cascade to these linked items, so ensure no active dependencies or unresolved actions are tied to these tickets.
